message:
fix(command): Lua scripting bugs, SORT_RO arity, RESTORE option parsing

Lua fixes:
- rawset: return mutated table instead of stale pre-mutation clone
- math.random(m,n): fix integer overflow for negative lower bounds
- string.char: reject values outside 0-255 instead of silent truncation

Command fixes:
- SORT_RO: use correct command name in arity error
- RESTORE: properly parse and validate REPLACE/ABSTTL/IDLETIME/FREQ
  options; reject unknown options with syntax error; support ABSTTL
  for absolute TTL timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
